name: Buffalo Chip Cookies/Slp
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a very large bowl, stir together margarine, brown sugar and granulated sugar.
3. Add eggs and vanilla; stir until well combined.
4. Stir in rolled oats and corn flakes.
5. In a smaller bowl, stir together flour, baking soda and baking powder.
6. Gradually add the flour mixture to the sugar mixture, stirring constantly.
7. Add 1 or 2 of your chosen stir-ins (raisins, peanuts, chopped nuts, coconut flakes, butterscotch chips, chocolate chips).
8. Using a serving spoon, drop dough onto ungreased cookie sheets in portions about ½ cup or one ice cream scoop per cookie.
9. Leave enough space between cookies as they will spread during baking.
10. Bake for about 12 minutes or until the edges are lightly golden brown.
11. Allow cookies to cool on the sheet for a few minutes before transferring them to a wire rack. Yield: approximately 4 dozen cookies.
